Families flocked to see mind-blowing magic, death-defying stunts and acts of breathtaking wonder in the show The New York Times called ""A high-tech magic extravaganza"" and NY1 called ""Awesome. A solid 10!""   Raymond has performed with 'The Illusionists' since 2014 with sold out gigs across the world. In fact he is the only Australian magician to perform on Broadway!
